EmployeeID as PersonID
,FirstName as EmployeeFirstName
,LastName as EmployeeFirstName
,(FirstName + ' ' + LastName) as EmployeeName

--Inspector Location

 FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim]
